openRequirements.requirement: Run and retain fresh evidence for actual Creating Space travel UI and travel to Lost Cities.
Add long-run pillager campaign, settlement-roads, and village-walls generation scenarios.
Add deterministic seed sampling for deposits, Y-bands, villages, roads, walls, structures, forageables, and spawn viability.
Define acceptable distance/depth distributions and fail outside confidence bounds.
Capture route telemetry for time-to-tier, deaths, lookup stalls, travel distance, recovery loops, and player confusion.
Define friction budgets per progression segment and compare playtest traces against them.
